porch.//: Python project: override the skeleton's npm implement-phase checks (config > protocol; survives codev updates). build has no analog (pure-Python package); tests run pytest in the validator package.

consultation.//: Drop the blind Gemini reviewer from per-phase consults: its impl/code-review sandbox can't see the worktree (no VERDICT -> parsed REQUEST_CHANGES). Codex+Claude review the real code; architect runs a full 3-way integration CMAP at the PR gate (diff fed inline, where Gemini works). Global (also applies to the review phase).

worktree.//: Opt-in runnable worktree config. See CLAUDE.md > Runnable Worktrees for stack-specific recipes (pnpm, npm, yarn, bun, cargo, poetry/uv, go mod). Defaults shown below are no-ops; fill in to enable.
